2:
SELECT DISTINCT e.*
FROM "eventspaces" e
WHERE e."capacity" = 200
  AND (e."name" ILIKE '%banquet hall%' OR e."name" ILIKE '%banquet halls%' OR e."name" ILIKE '%conference room%' OR e."name" ILIKE '%conference rooms%');
3:
SELECT DISTINCT r."name", r."address", 'restaurant' AS "type"
FROM "restaurants" r
WHERE r."food_service" ILIKE '%restaurant%' AND r."cuisine" ILIKE '%italian%'
UNION ALL
SELECT DISTINCT r."name", r."address", 'cafe' AS "type"
FROM "restaurants" r
WHERE r."food_service" ILIKE '%cafe%' AND r."cuisine" ILIKE '%italian%';
5:
SELECT DISTINCT *
FROM "restaurants"
WHERE (LOWER("food_service") LIKE '%restaurant%' OR LOWER("food_service") LIKE '%cafe%')
  AND LOWER("cuisine") LIKE '%italian%';
6:
SELECT DISTINCT "name", "role"
FROM "staff"
WHERE "role" ILIKE '%chef%'
UNION ALL
SELECT DISTINCT "name", "role"
FROM "staff"
WHERE "role" ILIKE '%server%' AND "language" ILIKE '%english%';
7:
SELECT DISTINCT s."id", s."name", s."role", s."language", s."additionalcolumn1", s."additionalcolumn2", s."additionalcolumn3"
FROM "staff" s
WHERE (s."role" ILIKE '%chef%' OR s."role" ILIKE '%server%')
  AND s."language" ILIKE '%english%';
109:
SELECT *
            FROM (
                SELECT DISTINCT s."name" AS specialist_name, sys."system_name" AS system_name
                FROM "it_support_specialists" s
JOIN "it_support_specialists_systems" iss ON s."id" = iss."it_specialist_id"
JOIN "systems" sys ON iss."system_id" = sys."system_id"
            ) sub
            ORDER BY s."name", sys."system_name" ;
110:
SELECT *
            FROM (
                SELECT DISTINCT s."name", sys."system_name", sys."is_active"
                FROM "it_support_specialists" s
JOIN "it_support_specialists_systems" ss ON s."id" = ss."it_specialist_id"
JOIN "systems" sys ON ss."system_id" = sys."system_id"
            ) sub
            ORDER BY s."name", sys."system_name" ;
111:
SELECT *
            FROM (
                SELECT DISTINCT iss."name" AS "specialist_name",
    s."system_name" AS "system_name",
    s."is_active" AS "system_active_status"
                FROM "it_support_specialists" iss
JOIN "it_support_specialists_systems" isss ON iss."id" = isss."it_specialist_id"
JOIN "systems" s ON isss."system_id" = s."system_id"
            ) sub
            ORDER BY "specialist_name", "system_name" ;
112:
SELECT r.responsibility
FROM responsibilities r
JOIN internships_responsibilities ir ON r.id = ir.responsibilityid
GROUP BY r.id, r.responsibility
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT ir.internshipid) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM internships);
114:
SELECT *
            FROM (
                SELECT DISTINCT s."name" AS specialist_name,
    sys."system_name" AS system_name
                FROM "it_support_specialists" s
    JOIN "it_support_specialists_systems" iss ON s."id" = iss."it_specialist_id"
    JOIN "systems" sys ON iss."system_id" = sys."system_id"
            ) sub
            ORDER BY s."name",
    sys."system_name" ;
115:
SELECT
    i."title" AS "Internship Title",
    r."responsibility" AS "Responsibility"
FROM
    "internships" i
    LEFT JOIN "internships_responsibilities" ir ON i."id" = ir."internshipid"
    LEFT JOIN "responsibilities" r ON ir."responsibilityid" = r."id"
ORDER BY
    i."title",
    r."responsibility";
261:
SELECT j."minimum_years", j."preferred_years"
FROM jobs j
ORDER BY j."salary" DESC
LIMIT 1;
265:
SELECT "preferred_years"
FROM "jobs"
ORDER BY "salary" DESC
LIMIT 1;
